penalties.description: No actual FLS intracorporeal suturing task performance is visible in the provided frames.

consensus_score.reasoning: Claude correctly identified that the video contains only presentation slides from a SAGES conference about automatic scoring, not an actual FLS task performance. GPT-4o incorrectly attempted to score what appears to be academic presentation content as if it were a task performance video.

claude_value.description: No actual FLS intracorporeal suturing task performance is visible in the provided frames.

gpt_value.description: Clear hand switch between throws was not observed.
The suture placement visibly deviated from the marked targets.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's assessment that this is presentation content rather than task performance is more accurate. GPT-4o appears to have misidentified slide content as actual surgical task performance.
No actual task was performed, so completion time should be 0.0 seconds rather than attempting to time presentation slides.
No actual surgical phases occurred in presentation slide content.
Presentation slides cannot receive FLS task performance scores.
